error.connection: Communication problem. Please check your connection and try again.
error.unauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.
error.orgNotFound: Could not determine active organization. Try reloading the page.
error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.boundary.message: Forgive me, Sir. There was a communication setback with the servers.
error.boundary.hint: If the issue persists, reload the page or try again in a moment.
errors.gemini.truncated: The AI response was cut off (statement with many entries). Try again; if it persists, import in parts or enter manually.
errors.gemini.quota: Gemini API quota exhausted (free tier or requests per minute). Wait about a minute and try again, or enable billing in Google AI Studio / Google Cloud Billing. You can also set GEMINI_MODEL to another model (e.g. gemini-2.5-flash or gemini-1.5-flash) in .env.local or Vercel.
